extraction.one_line_summary: VINGEGAARD Jonas took yellow with stage win at Col du Granon, POGAČAR cracked losing 2:51 on final climb after seeming invincible first 10 days.
tactical_patterns: VAN AERT attacked immediately for intermediate sprint 16.5km in, dragging MVDP along to burn rivals before mountains started.
Jumbo-Visma planted TEUNISSEN in early break for mountain support, showing multi-rider offensive preparation beyond simple tempo control.
POGAČAR yo-yoed repeatedly on climbs all day before final crack, suggesting cumulative fatigue rather than single explosive attack defeat.

rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: first Tour stage win coinciding with taking yellow suggests psychological breakthrough unlocking new confidence level
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: negative: lost 2:51 after dominating first 10 days, yo-yoing all day indicates systemic weakness not one bad moment
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: finished second at 1:10, Renaissance performance vaulting to podium position after years of decline
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: attacked 16.5km into mountainous stage for green jersey points, showing willingness to burn matches early for classification
rider_signals.GAUDU David: positive: strong ride moving up GC despite commentary noting him yo-yoing, finishing close enough to improve overall position
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: recovered from being dead on Galibier to finish fourth at 2:04, demonstrating veteran resilience on worst terrain
